ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company (e.g., AIG, MS) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the price belongs to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the price was recorded on */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" TEXT /* Adjusted close price of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Market Cap, Dividend Yield) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the financial metric (e.g., USD, %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, investor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the analytics belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics metric (e.g., Moving Average, Relative Strength Index) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the analytics metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analytics metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the article is related to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the news is related to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news item */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news item */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news item */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the news item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_news_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the trend is related to */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend (e.g., Bullish, Bearish) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction of the trend */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the trend (e.g., 0.8, 0.9) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the event occurred on */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., IPO, merger) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_events_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)
